_note: English template. Empty values fall back to ja automatically. Fill in incrementally. Keys must mirror ja.json.

meta.title: Kagemasu Character Search | The Eminence in Shadow: Master of Garden
meta.description: Character database for 'The Eminence in Shadow: Master of Garden' (Kagemasu). Search skill effects, combo multipliers, attributes, roles, and magic item performance for every character.

search.helpIntro: Prefix a keyword with a field name: to search only that field.
search.helpExample2: Hiragana/katakana and full/half-width characters are treated the same.
